About My Work

Hello, my name is Ethan Tang, I mainly program in python but have experince in the Processing enviornment.

Recent Projects

Qubit Solver(2026)

The Qubit Solver is an application in which the user is tasked with performing state reconstruction on a mystery qubit by using various quantum gates, and computational basis measurments for the mystery qubit. The application is designed to educate users about fundamental quantum computing concepts and can be used to test intuition regarding quantum computing. The program is built using OOP principles and uses numpy vectors and matricies in order to mathematically simulate quantum information .

Source Code
Project Repository, read the readme file for further instructions on usage
